revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with 'local i = {} function i.checkforcats(frame) local t = mw.title.getCurrentTitle() tc = t.getContent() mw.log(t) end return i'
WOSlinker moved page [[Module:User::WOSlinker/sandbox]] to [[Module:User:WOSlinker/sandbox]] without leaving a redirect
WOSlinker moved page [[Module:User:WOSlinker/sandbox]] to [[Module:AFC submission catcheck]] without leaving a redirect
remove Category:Articles created via the Article Wizard
Protected Module:AFC submission catcheck: since [[Template:AFC submission]] is protected ([Edit=Block all non-admin users] (indefinite) [Move=Block all non-admin users] (indefinite))

Changed protection level of Module:AFC submission catcheck: Per RFPP request, "mother" template only template protected now ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))

revision.text:
local p = {}
local function removeFalsePositives(str) return mw.ustring.gsub(mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<!--.--->", ""), "<nowiki>.-</nowiki>", "") end
function p.checkforcats(frame) local t = mw.title.getCurrentTitle() tc = t:getContent() if tc == nil then return "" end tc = removeFalsePositives(mw.ustring.gsub(tc,"%[%[Category:Articles created via the Article Wizard%]%]","")) if mw.ustring.match(tc, "%[%[%s-[Cc]ategory:" ) == nil then return "" else return "[[Category:AfC submissions with categories]]" end end
function p.submitted(frame) if mw.ustring.find(removeFalsePositives(mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent()), '{{AFC submission||', 1, true) then return frame.args[1] else return frame.args[2] end end
return p

local p = {}
local function removeFalsePositives(str) if str then return mw.ustring.gsub(mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<!--.--->", ""), "<nowiki>.-</nowiki>", "") end end
function p.checkforcats(frame) local t = mw.title.getCurrentTitle() tc = t:getContent() if tc == nil then return "" end tc = removeFalsePositives(mw.ustring.gsub(tc,"%[%[Category:Articles created via the Article Wizard%]%]","")) if mw.ustring.match(tc, "%[%[%s-[Cc]ategory:" ) == nil then return "" else return "[[Category:AfC submissions with categories]]" end end
function p.submitted(frame) if mw.ustring.find(removeFalsePositives(mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent()), '{{AFC submission||', 1, true) then return frame.args[1] else return frame.args[2] end end
return p

local p = {}
local function removeFalsePositives(str) if not str then return '' end return mw.ustring.gsub(mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<!--.--->", ""), "<nowiki>.-</nowiki>", "") end
function p.checkforcats(frame) local t = mw.title.getCurrentTitle() tc = t:getContent() if tc == nil then return "" end tc = removeFalsePositives(mw.ustring.gsub(tc,"%[%[Category:Articles created via the Article Wizard%]%]","")) if mw.ustring.match(tc, "%[%[%s-[Cc]ategory:" ) == nil then return "" else return "[[Category:AfC submissions with categories]]" end end
function p.submitted(frame) if mw.ustring.find(removeFalsePositives(mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent()), '{{AFC submission||', 1, true) then return frame.args[1] else return frame.args[2] end end
return p

revision.comment: updates as per edit request by [[User:DannyS712|DannyS712]]
revision.text:
local p = {}
local function removeFalsePositives(str) if not str then return '' end str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<!--.--->", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<nowiki>.-</nowiki>", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft categories.-}}", "") return str end
function p.checkforcats(frame) local t = mw.title.getCurrentTitle() tc = t:getContent() if tc == nil then return "" end tc = removeFalsePositives(tc) tc = mw.ustring.gsub(tc,"%[%[Category:Articles created via the Article Wizard%]%]","") tc = mw.ustring.gsub(tc,"%[%[Category:Unsuitable for Wikipedia AfC submissions%]%]","") if mw.ustring.match(tc, "%[%[%s-[Cc]ategory:" ) == nil then return "" else return "[[Category:AfC submissions with categories]]" end end
function p.submitted(frame) if mw.ustring.find(removeFalsePositives(mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent()), '{{AFC submission||', 1, true) then return frame.args[1] else return frame.args[2] end end
return p

revision.comment: updates as per edit request by [[User:DannyS712|DannyS712]]
revision.text:
local p = {}
local function removeFalsePositives(str) if not str then return '' end str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<!--.--->", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<nowiki>.-</nowiki>", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft categories.-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Articles created via the Article Wizard%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Unsuitable for Wikipedia AfC submissions%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Drafts about.-%]%]","") return str end
function p.checkforcats(frame) local t = mw.title.getCurrentTitle() tc = t:getContent() if tc == nil then return "" end tc = removeFalsePositives(tc) if mw.ustring.match(tc, "%[%[%s-[Cc]ategory:" ) == nil then return "" else return "[[Category:AfC submissions with categories]]" end end
function p.submitted(frame) if mw.ustring.find(removeFalsePositives(mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent()), '{{AFC submission||', 1, true) then return frame.args[1] else return frame.args[2] end end
return p

local p = {}
local function removeFalsePositives(str) if not str then return '' end str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<!--.--->", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<nowiki>.-</nowiki>", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft categories.-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Unsuitable for Wikipedia AfC submissions%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Drafts about.-%]%]","") return str end
function p.checkforcats(frame) local t = mw.title.getCurrentTitle() tc = t:getContent() if tc == nil then return "" end tc = removeFalsePositives(tc) if mw.ustring.match(tc, "%[%[%s-[Cc]ategory:" ) == nil then return "" else return "[[Category:AfC submissions with categories]]" end end
function p.submitted(frame) if mw.ustring.find(removeFalsePositives(mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent()), '{{AFC submission||', 1, true) then return frame.args[1] else return frame.args[2] end end
return p

revision.comment: also ignore categories ending in drafts, cc [[User:PrimeHunter]]
revision.text:
local p = {}
local function removeFalsePositives(str) if not str then return '' end str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<!--.--->", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<nowiki>.-</nowiki>", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft categories.-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Unsuitable for Wikipedia AfC submissions%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Drafts about.-%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:.-drafts%]%]","") return str end
function p.checkforcats(frame) local t = mw.title.getCurrentTitle() tc = t:getContent() if tc == nil then return "" end tc = removeFalsePositives(tc) if mw.ustring.match(tc, "%[%[%s-[Cc]ategory:" ) == nil then return "" else return "[[Category:AfC submissions with categories]]" end end
function p.submitted(frame) if mw.ustring.find(removeFalsePositives(mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent()), '{{AFC submission||', 1, true) then return frame.args[1] else return frame.args[2] end end
return p

revision.comment: make [[Category:Drafts foo]] also exempt, not just "Drafts about" - eg [[Category:Draft articles]]
revision.text:
local p = {}
local function removeFalsePositives(str) if not str then return '' end str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<!--.--->", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<nowiki>.-</nowiki>", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft categories.-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Unsuitable for Wikipedia AfC submissions%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Drafts.-%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:.-drafts%]%]","") return str end
function p.checkforcats(frame) local t = mw.title.getCurrentTitle() tc = t:getContent() if tc == nil then return "" end tc = removeFalsePositives(tc) if mw.ustring.match(tc, "%[%[%s-[Cc]ategory:" ) == nil then return "" else return "[[Category:AfC submissions with categories]]" end end
function p.submitted(frame) if mw.ustring.find(removeFalsePositives(mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent()), '{{AFC submission||', 1, true) then return frame.args[1] else return frame.args[2] end end
return p

revision.comment: attempt to fix false positive if {{draft categories}} includes a template within in (eg default sort (not really a template but looks like one))
revision.text:
local p = {}
local function removeFalsePositives(str) if not str then return '' end str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<!--.--->", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<nowiki>.-</nowiki>", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft categories[^{}]-{{[^{}]-}}[^{}]-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft categories.-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Unsuitable for Wikipedia AfC submissions%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Drafts.-%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:.-drafts%]%]","") return str end
function p.checkforcats(frame) local t = mw.title.getCurrentTitle() tc = t:getContent() if tc == nil then return "" end tc = removeFalsePositives(tc) if mw.ustring.match(tc, "%[%[%s-[Cc]ategory:" ) == nil then return "" else return "[[Category:AfC submissions with categories]]" end end
function p.submitted(frame) if mw.ustring.find(removeFalsePositives(mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent()), '{{AFC submission||', 1, true) then return frame.args[1] else return frame.args[2] end end
return p

local p = {}
local function removeFalsePositives(str) if not str then return '' end str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<!--.--->", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<nowiki>.-</nowiki>", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft categories[^{}]-{{[^{}]-}}[^{}]-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft categories.-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Unsuitable for Wikipedia AfC submissions%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:[Dd]rafts.-%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:.-drafts%]%]","") return str end
function p.checkforcats(frame) local t = mw.title.getCurrentTitle() tc = t:getContent() if tc == nil then return "" end tc = removeFalsePositives(tc) if mw.ustring.match(tc, "%[%[%s-[Cc]ategory:" ) == nil then return "" else return "[[Category:AfC submissions with categories]]" end end
function p.submitted(frame) if mw.ustring.find(removeFalsePositives(mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent()), '{{AFC submission||', 1, true) then return frame.args[1] else return frame.args[2] end end
return p

revision.comment: Primefac moved page [[Module:AFC submission catcheck]] to [[Module:AfC submission catcheck]] without leaving a redirect: standardizing across the project
revision.text:
local p = {}
local function removeFalsePositives(str) if not str then return '' end str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<!--.--->", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<nowiki>.-</nowiki>", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft categories[^{}]-{{[^{}]-}}[^{}]-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft categories.-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Unsuitable for Wikipedia AfC submissions%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:[Dd]rafts.-%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:.-drafts%]%]","") return str end
function p.checkforcats(frame) local t = mw.title.getCurrentTitle() tc = t:getContent() if tc == nil then return "" end tc = removeFalsePositives(tc) if mw.ustring.match(tc, "%[%[%s-[Cc]ategory:" ) == nil then return "" else return "[[Category:AfC submissions with categories]]" end end
function p.submitted(frame) if mw.ustring.find(removeFalsePositives(mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent()), '{{AFC submission||', 1, true) then return frame.args[1] else return frame.args[2] end end
return p

local p = {}
local function removeFalsePositives(str) if not str then return '' end str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<!--.--->", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<nowiki>.-</nowiki>", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft categories[^{}]-{{[^{}]-}}[^{}]-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft categories.-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Unsuitable for Wikipedia AfC submissions%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:[Dd]rafts.-%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:.-drafts%]%]","") return str end
function p.checkforcats(frame) local t = mw.title.getCurrentTitle() tc = t:getContent() if tc == nil then return "" end tc = removeFalsePositives(tc) if mw.ustring.match(tc, "%[%[%s-[Cc]ategory:" ) == nil then return "" else return "[[Category:AfC submissions with categories]]" end end
function p.submitted(frame) if mw.ustring.find(removeFalsePositives(mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent()), '{{AfC submission||', 1, true) then return frame.args[1] else return frame.args[2] end end
return p

revision.comment: check for either {{AFC submission}} or {{AfC submission}} (caps)
revision.text:
local p = {}
local function removeFalsePositives(str) if not str then return '' end str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<!--.--->", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<nowiki>.-</nowiki>", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft categories[^{}]-{{[^{}]-}}[^{}]-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft categories.-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Unsuitable for Wikipedia AfC submissions%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:[Dd]rafts.-%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:.-drafts%]%]","") return str end
function p.checkforcats(frame) local t = mw.title.getCurrentTitle() tc = t:getContent() if tc == nil then return "" end tc = removeFalsePositives(tc) if mw.ustring.match(tc, "%[%[%s-[Cc]ategory:" ) == nil then return "" else return "[[Category:AfC submissions with categories]]" end end
function p.submitted(frame) local text = removeFalsePositives(mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent()) if mw.ustring.find(text, '{{AfC submission||', 1, true) or mw.ustring.find(text, '{{AFC submission||', 1, true) then return frame.args[1] else return frame.args[2] end end
return p

local p = {}
local function removeFalsePositives(str) if not str then return '' end str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<!--.--->", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<nowiki>.-</nowiki>", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft categories[^{}]-{{[^{}]-}}[^{}]-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft categories.-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Unsuitable for Wikipedia AfC submissions%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:[Dd]rafts?.-%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:.-drafts?%]%]","") return str end
function p.checkforcats(frame) local t = mw.title.getCurrentTitle() tc = t:getContent() if tc == nil then return "" end tc = removeFalsePositives(tc) if mw.ustring.match(tc, "%[%[%s-[Cc]ategory:" ) == nil then return "" else return "[[Category:AfC submissions with categories]]" end end
function p.submitted(frame) local text = removeFalsePositives(mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent()) if mw.ustring.find(text, '{{AfC submission||', 1, true) or mw.ustring.find(text, '{{AFC submission||', 1, true) then return frame.args[1] else return frame.args[2] end end
return p

local p = {}
local function removeFalsePositives(str) if not str then return '' end str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<!--.--->", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<nowiki>.-</nowiki>", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft [Cc]ategories[^{}]-{{[^{}]-}}[^{}]-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft [Cc]ategories.-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Unsuitable for Wikipedia AfC submissions%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:[Dd]rafts?.-%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:.-drafts?%]%]","") return str end
function p.checkforcats(frame) local t = mw.title.getCurrentTitle() tc = t:getContent() if tc == nil then return "" end tc = removeFalsePositives(tc) if mw.ustring.match(tc, "%[%[%s-[Cc]ategory:" ) == nil then return "" else return "[[Category:AfC submissions with categories]]" end end
function p.submitted(frame) local text = removeFalsePositives(mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent()) if mw.ustring.find(text, '{{AfC submission||', 1, true) or mw.ustring.find(text, '{{AFC submission||', 1, true) then return frame.args[1] else return frame.args[2] end end
return p

local p = {}
local function removeFalsePositives(str) if not str then return '' end str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<!--.--->", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<nowiki>.-</nowiki>", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft [Cc]ategories[^{}]-{{[^{}]-}}[^{}]-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft [Cc]ategories.-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raftcat.-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Unsuitable for Wikipedia AfC submissions%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:[Dd]rafts?.-%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:.-drafts?%]%]","") return str end
function p.checkforcats(frame) local t = mw.title.getCurrentTitle() tc = t:getContent() if tc == nil then return "" end tc = removeFalsePositives(tc) if mw.ustring.match(tc, "%[%[%s-[Cc]ategory:" ) == nil then return "" else return "[[Category:AfC submissions with categories]]" end end
function p.submitted(frame) local text = removeFalsePositives(mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent()) if mw.ustring.find(text, '{{AfC submission||', 1, true) or mw.ustring.find(text, '{{AFC submission||', 1, true) then return frame.args[1] else return frame.args[2] end end
return p

local p = {}
local function removeFalsePositives(str) if not str then return '' end str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<!--.--->", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "<nowiki>.-</nowiki>", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft [Cc]ategories[^{}]-{{[^{}]-}}[^{}]-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft [Cc]ategories.-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raftcat[^{}]-{{[^{}]-}}[^{}]-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raftcat.-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Unsuitable for Wikipedia AfC submissions%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:[Dd]rafts?.-%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:.-drafts?%]%]","") return str end
function p.checkforcats(frame) local t = mw.title.getCurrentTitle() tc = t:getContent() if tc == nil then return "" end tc = removeFalsePositives(tc) if mw.ustring.match(tc, "%[%[%s-[Cc]ategory:" ) == nil then return "" else return "[[Category:AfC submissions with categories]]" end end
function p.submitted(frame) local text = removeFalsePositives(mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent()) if mw.ustring.find(text, '{{AfC submission||', 1, true) or mw.ustring.find(text, '{{AFC submission||', 1, true) then return frame.args[1] else return frame.args[2] end end
return p

local p = {} local function removeFalsePositives(str) if not str then return '' end str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, ".-", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft [Cc]ategories[^{}]-{{[^{}]-}}[^{}]-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft [Cc]ategories.-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raftcat[^{}]-{{[^{}]-}}[^{}]-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raftcat.-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Unsuitable for Wikipedia AfC submissions%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:[Dd]rafts?.-%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:.-drafts?%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "
.-
", "") return str end function p.checkforcats(frame) local t = mw.title.getCurrentTitle() tc = t:getContent() if tc == nil then return "" end tc = removeFalsePositives(tc) if mw.ustring.match(tc, "%[%[%s-[Cc]ategory:" ) == nil then return "" else return "[[Category:AfC submissions with categories]]" end end function p.submitted(frame) local text = removeFalsePositives(mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent()) if mw.ustring.find(text, '{{AfC submission||', 1, true) or mw.ustring.find(text, '{{AFC submission||', 1, true) then return frame.args[1] else return frame.args[2] end end return p

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 31 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:AfC_submission_catcheck]]
revision.text:
local p = {} local function removeFalsePositives(str) if not str then return '' end str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, ".-", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft [Cc]ategories[^{}]-{{[^{}]-}}[^{}]-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raft [Cc]ategories.-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raftcat[^{}]-{{[^{}]-}}[^{}]-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "{{[Dd]raftcat.-}}", "") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:Unsuitable for Wikipedia AfC submissions%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:[Dd]rafts?.-%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str,"%[%[Category:.-drafts?%]%]","") str = mw.ustring.gsub(str, "
.-
", "") return str end function p.checkforcats(frame) local t = mw.title.getCurrentTitle() tc = t:getContent() if tc == nil then return "" end tc = removeFalsePositives(tc) if mw.ustring.match(tc, "%[%[%s-[Cc]ategory:" ) == nil then return "" else return "[[Category:AfC submissions with categories]]" end end function p.submitted(frame) local text = removeFalsePositives(mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent()) if mw.ustring.find(text, '{{AfC submission||', 1, true) or mw.ustring.find(text, '{{AFC submission||', 1, true) then return frame.args[1] else return frame.args[2] end end return p
